title: Welcome to RC Showdown!
author: Razberchan
summaryHTML: Welcome to RC Showdown — the home of custom RC formats! Battle in RC OU, RC UU, RC Ubers, RC Doubles, and VGC.. Good luck!

title: First RC Showdown Ladder Tournament

title: Syncing Dex Data
author: InfraredGod
summaryHTML: Servers restarted so that RC Showdown's dex data matched that of the Roblox game and Pokedex website. This was done to prevent undocumented changes from running amok. Move and ability descriptions will follow suit.
